content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally with Nifty +0.79%, IT +2.04%, Pharma +2.56%, Auto +1.71%, Metals +1.95%, Realty +2.36% and VIX down 5.4% to 18.65. Sector breadth is strong with multiple themes (pharma on Sun-Organon, metals on commodity strength, power on demand) playing out. Book is already 60% deployed and many candidates have run 5-9% intraday — late-session chase risk is high.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23900,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Down 2.6% but bounced today +1.81% off lows. Q4 strong (PAT +35%, GNPA 1.45%, loan growth 22%). Sector tailwind intact. SL at 76.50 well below current 79.34. Thesis intact, no change needed."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1029.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SL was already moved to 1029 (above entry 984), locking in ~4.6% gain. With CMP 1050 and stock just below VWAP after running hard, current SL is appropriate. No change in target. NO-OP MODIFY check: SL=1029, target=1110 unchanged — converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Defensive gold ETF, P&L -0.4%, no thesis break. Gold near record highs; geopolitical hedge. SL at 119 sufficient."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1418.00,
      "new_target": 1465.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Currently stored SL is 1418 (already at breakeven+). CMP 1424 is just above SL with stock at 52w high after Q4 beat. No-op against stored values — converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Q4 results due Apr 30 (3 trading days). Stock recovered from lows, P&L -1.4% with SL 2295 still 1.8% below CMP. Cannot tighten SL meaningfully without exposing to event-day noise. Hold through earnings; binary risk acknowledged but position sized appropriately."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 406.00,
      "new_target": 425.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Up 1.5% with stock breaking 52w high (414.40 today, CMP 410.55). Trailing SL mandate triggers at +2%, but currently at +1.5% with strong momentum near 52w high. Move SL from 405 to 406 — modest but lifts above entry of 404.50, locking breakeven. Target unchanged at 425 (analyst range Rs 400-440)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "P&L -0.9%, stock made 52w high today (1824) before fading to 1792. Below entry slightly. SL 1760 (-2.8% from CMP) is appropriate given ATR; target 1920 still valid given momentum + Nabha Power catalyst. No change."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Up 7.17% on Organon acquisition. P&L only +0.2% (entered at 1734 today near intraday avg). SL 1685 (-3% from CMP) gives room for post-news volatility. Target 1830 intact. Investor call today key. Trail not warranted yet at +0.2%."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 316.00,
      "new_target": 335.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Currently SL 315, CMP 321.20 (+0.1%). Tightening SL to 316 (just below entry 320.50) puts SL near today's intraday low support (316.95). Target unchanged 335 (Rs 9T capex tailwind). Modest tighten, captures small breakeven cushion."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "INDUSINDBK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Bearish sentiment from supplementary research: FY26 PAT collapsed -64.7%, GNPA up to 3.43%, ongoing SFIO/SEBI investigations. Q4 bounce is a relief rally not a clean turnaround. Skip."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HINDZINC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Pending BUY at 612 was placed earlier; CMP now 629.55 (+6.98% intraday, far above pending limit). The limit will not fill in non-gapping market. Cancel this stale order — chasing at CMP is late-cycle entry after a +7% gap day; risk-reward unfavorable. Will let original limit expire/cancel via order cleanup; not stacking a new BUY."
    },
    {
      "action": "CANCEL",
      "symbol": "HINDZINC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Cancel the stale BUY 75x HINDZINC LIMIT @ 612 placed 475m ago. Stock has run to 629.55 (+6.98%); limit will not fill. Don't chase at highs."
    },
    {
      "action": "CANCEL",
      "symbol": "TATAPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Cancel stale BUY 110x TATAPOWER LIMIT @ 443 (placed 505m ago). Stock now 453.45 (+4.24%), well above limit. Also, power cluster already includes NTPC + TORNTPOWER + POWERGRID — adding TATAPOWER would breach cluster discipline (~25%+ exposure)."
    },
    {
      "action": "CANCEL",
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Cancel stale BUY 1500x PHARMABEES LIMIT @ 23.65 (placed 383m ago). CMP 23.73, just 0.3% above limit — could fill on a tick down, but already hold SUNPHARMA (the dominant Sun-Organon catalyst stock). Adding pharma ETF on top creates redundant pharma exposure. Free up the cash buffer."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "ANANTRAJ",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.3,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "ED raid Apr 24 under PMLA. Today's +7% bounce is dead-cat-bounce risk ahead of May 11 earnings. Avoid event/governance overhang."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "M&MFIN",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Headline Q4 strong but stock -27% YTD shows market skeptical of asset quality. Today's +9% intraday is post-earnings short-cover; chasing at the top is poor risk-reward."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "SAIL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "No deep dive provided. Skip in absence of data."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "VEDL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Demerger record date May 1 — already largely priced in. Event-driven trade with binary outcome. Skip."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "AXISBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Down 3.41% post weak Q4 with higher provisions. Falling knife setup; banking exposure already adequate via implied PSU bank tilt. Skip."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Thesis intact. Stock recovering. SL 76.50 appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already at 1029 (locks +4.6%). At +6.7% unrealized but stock fading from intraday high; current SL is fine."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive position; minimal P&L; SL 119 unchanged."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1418 already locks breakeven on Rs 1413 entry. No further tighten warranted at +0.8%."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Earnings Apr 30. SL 2295 (-1.8% from CMP) appropriate; can't tighten without earnings-day noise risk."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 406.00,
      "reasoning": "Stock at 52w highs. Trail SL from 405 to 406 — modest move above entry to lock breakeven."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Position underwater -0.9%. SL 1760 appropriate; let setup play out."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Just entered, +0.2%. Investor call today is binary. SL 1685 gives room."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 316.00,
      "reasoning": "Tighten SL from 315 to 316 — just under entry, near intraday low support 316.95."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "SUNPHARMA investor call at 8AM IST today is the swing factor for pharma sector — monitor for next session. HINDUNILVR Apr 30 earnings is the binary event for FMCG hold. INDUSINDBK to revisit only if stock holds 870+ for 2-3 sessions confirming clean breakout above resistance. ANANTRAJ off the list pending May 11 results clarity.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 60% deployed across 9 holdings — well diversified. Power cluster exposure: NTPC (~5%) + TORNTPOWER (~5%) + POWERGRID (~5%) ≈ 15% — within limits but no room for TATAPOWER add. Three stale OPEN orders being cancelled (HINDZINC, TATAPOWER, PHARMABEES) to clean book and free cash buffer. No new entries today: late-session breakout chasing after a +5-9% gap day is the textbook over-trading trap. Deployment hysteresis rule applies — protect capital. Day-8 win rate of 11% on rolling basis is concerning; stop-and-target discipline is doing the work via profit factor 2.2x. Stay with the system."
}
